title: monday Service Conditional Status Changes Feature

posts.author: serkanyucel (Serkan Yucel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe the conditional status change feature should also be available for the Monday Service. It would be particularly beneficial for resolving ticket requests, tracking incidents, and measuring SLAs. Regardless of the process, this feature would help avoid missing information by enforcing mandatory fields.

Additional Note: I think the conditional status change feature should be included in all of Monday’s products (except Work Management) and that customers find this feature appealing.
